faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Ardsley homes?
faqs.answer: Ardsley homes most commonly experience infestations of German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and Oriental cockroaches. German roaches are frequently found in kitchens and bathrooms, while American and Oriental roaches often enter through basements and crawl spaces, particularly in older Ardsley properties.
